title: Emergencies
doc_html:
§1113.4. Emergencies

            The provisions of this Part shall not be applicable in emergency situations, which are hereby defined to include but not be limited to those situations in which a patient is in imminent danger of death or great bodily harm and blood or tissue screened pursuant to this Part is not available.

            Acts 1987, No. 234, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1299.144 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
doc_text:
§1113.4.  Emergencies
The provisions of this Part shall not be applicable in emergency situations, which are
hereby defined to include but not be limited to those situations in which a patient is in
imminent danger of death or great bodily harm and blood or tissue screened pursuant to this
Part is not available.
Acts 1987, No. 234, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1299.144 by HCR 84 of 2015
R.S.
